seoTitle: How Does Typeform Work With AI in 2026
metaDescription: See how Typeform's AI features help generate questions, personalize forms, and automate repetitive tasks for faster form building.
intro: Typeform has added artificial intelligence throughout its form-building process to help you create smarter surveys and quizzes faster. This guide explains how Typeform's AI features work, from generating questions automatically to personalizing the respondent experience and automating repetitive tasks.

steps.heading: What is Typeform AI
steps.body: Typeform's AI features are built into the platform to simplify form creation, from suggesting questions to improving survey design based on your goals.

steps.heading: Create forms with AI
steps.body: Use AI to generate questions automatically based on a topic or purpose, reducing the time it takes to build a new form from scratch.

steps.heading: AI logic and automation features
steps.body: AI can assist with setting up conditional logic and automating repetitive parts of building a form, helping you focus on the content that matters most.

steps.heading: Best practices and real-world use cases
steps.body: Combine AI-generated suggestions with your own review to keep forms accurate and aligned with your brand, especially for surveys, quizzes, and lead generation tools.

faq.question: Can Typeform's AI write questions for me?
faq.answer: Yes, Typeform's AI features can generate questions automatically based on the topic or purpose you provide.

faq.question: Does AI improve response rates?
faq.answer: AI-assisted personalization and logic can help create more relevant forms, which may improve response rates, though results depend on how the form is used.

faq.question: Is Typeform AI available on the free plan?
faq.answer: AI feature availability can vary by plan, so it's worth checking Typeform's current plan details to see what's included at each tier.

faq.question: Should I still review AI-generated questions before publishing?
faq.answer: Yes, reviewing AI-generated content helps ensure the questions accurately reflect your intent and brand voice before the form goes live.
